name: api
context: You are building a zero-dependency Node.js HTTP API in server.cjs using the built-in 'http' module only (no express, no npm packages). It MUST listen on the port from process.env.PORT. Responses are JSON (content-type application/json). Read the file first; each step adds one route and keeps the others working.

rungs.title: health
rungs.prompt: Add route GET /health that responds with JSON {"ok": true}.

rungs.title: echo
rungs.prompt: Add route GET /echo?msg=... that responds with JSON {"msg": <the msg query param>}.

rungs.title: add
rungs.prompt: Add route GET /add?a=..&b=.. that responds with JSON {"sum": a+b} (numbers).

rungs.title: notfound
rungs.prompt: Any unknown path must respond with HTTP status 404.
